name: spd-prefeitura
description: Sistema de gerenciamento interno da Secretaria de Planejamento e Desenvolvimento de Votorantim

scripts.prisma:deploy: dotenv -e .env -- npx prisma migrate deploy --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.seed: npm --workspace packages/db run seed:admin && npm --workspace packages/db run seed:convenios
scripts.prisma:setup: npm run prisma:deploy && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.start: npm run prisma:setup && npm run dev
scripts.setup: npm run prisma:setup && npm run seed
scripts.build:railway:api: npx prisma generate --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build:db && npm run build:api
scripts.start:railway:api: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && node apps/api/dist/main.js

author: Secretaria de Planejamento e Desenvolvimento - Votorantim
